title: pinus laricio var. austriaca
intro: Pinus laricio var. austriaca, also known as Austrian stone pine, is a coniferous evergreen tree species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The resin of this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to heal wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Pinus laricio var. austriaca include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pinus laricio var. austriaca include essential oils extracted from its resin, which can be used in aromatherapy to relieve stress and promote relaxation.
